programme.title: Daktari 217
programme.desc: Daktari 217

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Two chemists at one of Jonathans subsidiaries have developed a new hallucinogen and their supervisor is killed when he tries to report them to Jonathan

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey have a high school drug case blow up in their faces when it turns out their teenage informant is a drug pusher himself

programme.title: Starsky 303
programme.desc: Starsky 303

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: North and South Limbawe are in conflict over oil and a despotic General plans to overthrow his own government in South Limbawe and attacks his neighbors to the North String and Dom are sent by Archangel to aid North Limbawe and its leader Seku Logana but Logana has his own prejudices about receiving aid for his cause Also in the mix is an old Vietnam buddy of Hawkes Marty Vidor who is working as a mercenary for South Limbawe and Hawke is hesitant to take him on since Vidor just may know the location of the missing Saint John

programme.title: Friday 13th the Series
programme.desc: Ryan believes that a half-man half-monster comic-book hero has come to life and is responsible for the murder of a shopkeeper

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou plans an elaborate sting operation to infiltrate a cult but everything goes awry when the new guys arent prepared and Matt is left picking up the pieces

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team gets back to work but have their anger management sessions had any effect Sonia and Lyndah confront a gang of roller derby girls whove got the skills to protect their car

programme.title: The Oklahoma Cyclone
programme.desc: A search for his missing father prompts a cowboy to infiltrate a gang of desperadoes

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A groom to be gets a lesson in monogamy from the stripper from hell at his bachelor party and then his bride is overwhelmed with suspicion and mistrust and busts married men who cheat due to having caught her father step-out on mom when she was a child

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A greedy rock promoter tries to steal the money raised at a benefit concert when his conscience intervenes

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Farmer George is attracted to Mary Jo the nubile young woman who helps out with the chores The problem is shes in love with a scarecrow

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Faded playwright Arthur Brown uses electronic equipment to record private chats of other people as inspiration for his work His subject Diane is having an affair with Carla Magnuson When Dianes husband finds out everyone is in danger

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Unethical psychiatrist Dr Peter Milne gets romantically involved with unstable Sara Kendal His manipulation of her mind and emotions makes her illness worsen When she cant tell dreams from reality he becomes her rages target

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A murderer who meets his victims through a dating service stalks Natalie and she learns of Nicks secret past

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Two young antique store owners must recover cursed antiques

programme.title: Day of the Dead
programme.desc: Trapped in a missile silo a small team of scientists civilians and trigger-happy soldiers battle desperately to ensure the survival of the human race but tension inside the base is reaching breaking-point and the zombies are gathering outside

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: When the supply Sgt is reluctant to go on vacation Sgt Carter bets him any Knucklehead can take over his job Of course what bigger Knucklehead than Pyle to prove him right

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Latin American dictator is exiled to the island and he immediately declares himself dictator of the island with Gilligan as his puppet leader in training

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A satellite bound for Mars lands on the island The castaways hope to use it to provide visual evidence to the world that they are still alive

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa secretly joins an over-sixties club known as the Young Old Timers

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa reluctantly agrees to let Luke and Kate trade the McCoys family car plus 80 for a newer model but they regret their decision when they realize that he was genuinely attached to the ancient vehicle

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJs truck is hijacked by three beautiful sisters They need BJs rig and his help in order to make a big moonshine run that will raise money for their ailing fathers operation

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur is all set to enjoy a weeks vacation relaxing at home but his plans are ruined when his overbearing Aunt Martha and her talking parrot unexpectedly drop by for a prolonged visit

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: While Mister Ed phones in racing tips to Pimlico Race Course the Posts and the Addisons play Find The Statue

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans efforts to help a German baroness to escape are thwarted by Klink who has arranged for the transfer of a British prisoner who is senior to Colonel Hogan

programme.title: Hogans Hereos
programme.desc: When a British commando unit is captured before they can blow up a crucial German ammo dump Hogan and his men attempt to finish the job

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Boys must scheme to procure new engines for their beloved boat before Binghamton ships the 73 Crew out to a new location

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton angers some of the native islanders then must make amends with them in order to make a good impression on a certain VIP who is due soon for a visit

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: In the first of the 3 part sea maneuvers Gomer sneaks a cat aboard a Navy ship unaware there is sensitive Petty Chief Officer who throws all Contraband overboard

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Ava threatens to shut down Fonanas strip show

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: A senator gets photographed in a compromising position with three housewives whose husbands neglect them When one girl is run down by a car its obvious that all three are in danger from a vengeful victim

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Jennifer is kidnapped by a man who wants to get some of the money from an old crime by holding his ex-partners wife who happens to be a dead ringer for Jennifer

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick is invited to a publishers party in New York Joanna is unable to go with him since some good friends are due to arrive at the inn After some prodding Dick reluctantly agrees to take George with him

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Michael helps Larry marry the girl of his dreams and Joanna holds Dick responsible for his actions in her dream

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Polly and Robin are sick and the Major and kids must take care of them On top of that he must also try to write her new article which is riddled with errors from her being sick and tired when written Holowachuk accidentally crumples up and ruins General Craigs photo of the Rat Pack signed by all the members

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways desperately try to find a new water source as they have completely exhausted their current water supply

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch takes a liking to Nina Cutter a beautiful woman who turns out to be a cat burglar responsible for a series of thefts at the yacht club

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Down in Texas Matt and Froy are staking out a cement mixer but their repo turns disastrous when an innocent bystander gets showered in concrete In LA Frankie takes the reins with an alcoholic debtor and Lou and Sonia deal with a diva who pushes Sonia to her breaking point TV-14-L

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First Frankie and Lyndah find themselves in a fancy neighborhood dealing with a pair of uptight yuppies with well-coordinated clothes and well-coordinated attacks Then Lyndah goes wild when a truck-driving debtor gets physical with Sonia And finally Matt and Froy face down a backwoods Texan with secret ammunition TV-14-LV

programme.title: The St Valentines Day Massacre
programme.desc: Follows the chronicles of gang wars held in Chicago in the early twenties between the Southside Mob and the Northside Gang Al Capone forms a team to permanently get rid of his arch rival Moran

programme.title: Solar Crisis
programme.desc: A huge Solar flare is predicted to fry Earth Astronauts must fly to the sun to drop a talking bomb Freddy at the right time so the flare will point somewhere else Giant IXL Corp CEO Teague thinks the flare wont happen and wants the mission to fail so he can buy the planet cheaply while the scare lasts

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Old moonshine runners Uncle Jesse and Boss decide to settle who is better once and for all in a race in nearby Hatchapee County However both of them have to beware of Hatchapee County Sheriff Emmitt Loomis while Uncle Jesse should be doubly concerned about Boss scheme to switch water with moonshine

programme.title: Hercules 110
programme.desc: Hercules 110

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: An exhibition for the first arrival of the Taelons showcases different artifacts An artifact causes Liam to travel to an alternate time Zoor questions how Daan was able to rejoin the Commonality Zoor experiments with brain waves in order to cause aggression

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: A revolutionary med cell is created that could save countless lives But fearing that the Morthrens could turn it into something deadly the Blackwood team tries to get their hands on it first Meanwhile Malzor desperately tries to acquire it to heal a dying Mana his second-in-command

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A sickly stranger claiming to be Tressas long-lost brother appears at the Langford house

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Jim befriends a little girl with volatile behavior

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Alpha is on the verge of being destroyed by intense shockwaves emanating from a planet they are approaching The Alphans land on the planet seemingly devoid of any human existence but being run by a group of machines The machines explain to the visitors that their human overlords are in a state of regeneration but the chief machine the Guardian sees the Alphans as a threat and it is down to two newly regenerated females known as A and B to decide their fates

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is asked to winter in the north with a herd of cattle over the winter with two men until the owner returns One man quits and Cheyenne runs off the other one who is the foreman after he attacks a neighbors wife in her cabin

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: An undercover cop is murdered with Mike Stones gun and a hotshot young inspector seems determined to pin the rap on Stone

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: A prince the absolute ruler of a principality has 15 million which he plans to use for arms to wage war on a neighboring oil-rich country Briggs devises a scheme that involves breaking the bank of the princes casino First the IMF will utilize a computer to take 200000 at roulette That will provide the stake the IMF needs to take the prince at a high-stakes game of baccarat

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon try to track down the driver who hit and run with a pedestrian

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives break up a gambling ring Friday is undercover

programme.title: The Fugitive S02E10
programme.desc: The Fugitive S02E10

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: The sociopathic son of a neighbor recently returned from away stirs up serious trouble for the Barclays

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: During a fur trapping trip Cheyenne joins with old Hoot Hollister who plans to return to St Louis to marry his girlfriend While on a riverboat to St Louis he and Cheyenne get mixed up with a teacher and crooked gamblers

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: Lion of the Desert
programme.desc: Set during the reign of Mussolini this epic tale revolves around Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar Omar an Arab Muslim rebel takes on the Italian attack which is directed towards conquering Libya

programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.desc: In New Mexico an alien spacecraft abducts two young children and an old man 25 years later the children are returned as adults to the same town now beset by strange cattle mutilations

programme.desc: A family moves to a suburban town only to be coerced into joining a suspicious club

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 43 kicks off with amateur fights between 6'8'' Will Woo vs. Murray Hunter followed by powerhouses Riley Pequin vs. Levi Armstrong. And finally, pro fighter Jason Zentrgraf takes on UFC Veteran Nick ""The Promise"" Ring.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 43 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features the exhilarating matchup of Keegan ""The Condition"" Oliver vs. pro debut Derek ""Manchild"" Falk. This is followed by the entertaining contest of Aaron ""Vanilla Gorilla"" Gallant vs. Mike O'Neil, and the first Welterweight Title Defense for Sergej ""El Dorado"" Juskevic as he takes on challenger Lorawnt-T Nelson.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Connor Hayes v. Arydas Pumputis

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.desc: World renown chef Ms Felicia Grady stops by the show to cook a delicious meal for the crew

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Sherard Show on location at the Comedy Chateau
programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Sam Kwasman Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who is the original voice of Donald Duck-Mr Sam Kwasman Also the legendary Freda Payne returns to the show to speak about her recent Induction

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The Lightning League lands on a desert planet with no plant life assuming that is where Audric would be They are mistakenly led by a mirage of Audric to try and rescue him but they are attacked by the native nomads who have been tricked

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: While teaching the cat people of a planet war strategy Oon wanders from lecture to lecture feeling unneeded and worthless Gillian discovers the planet houses a Nightwalker which is kept behind enormous tall doors and sealed with a gold symbol

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: An ancient crystal skull is stolen during an auction By looking through it Miles Mayhem learns Matt Trakkers identity as the leader of MASK and blackmails him into giving up the rest of his secrets and technology

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: During Glorias first Indy 500 race all electronic devices suddenly come to a stop thanks to a powerful EMP device VENOM is projecting from a blimp Their next target the International Safe Corporation

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: During the Simon Belmont Awards the Poltergeist King says that Trevor Belmont who is Simon Belmonts grandfather is a coward which makes Simon worried until him and Captain N get advice from a wizard

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: After playing a riddle game Captain N Princess Lana and Simon get a call from Mayor Squaresly that Tetris is in trouble so they go and check it out while the Puzzle King plans to rule Tetris

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD try to stop Gadget from attending the International Congress of Policemen in London

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain go to an Old Wild West amusement park to stop a MAD plot to make the park their new headquarters
